summary: Virtual Classroom Module Batch 3 testing completed. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed a bug in models.py where StudentProgressCreate required session_id in body but frontend correctly sends it via URL path. All WebSocket events (RAISE_HAND, LOWER_HAND, END_CLASS, CHAT) broadcast correctly. Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_classroom_batch3.py - New test file for Batch 3 features

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Landing page, Auth flow, Classroom route protection verified)

test_credentials.note: This session is for user validate_test_teacher@test.com (teacher role)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique UUIDs for isolation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual Classroom Module Batch 3 is complete. Tested: Progress submission (POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/progress) with revenue trigger, Student rating (POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/rate) with teacher average update, Recording toggle with stealth mode (visible flag), WebSocket events RAISE_HAND/LOWER_HAND/END_CLASS/CHAT. Frontend modals (SessionReportModal, RateTeacherModal) have proper data-testid attributes. Fixed bug where session_id was required in body but frontend sends via URL.

bugs_fixed.issue: StudentProgressCreate model required session_id in body, but API uses URL path parameter
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Pydantic model had session_id as required field, frontend correctly sends it in URL path
bugs_fixed.fix: Made session_id Optional[str] = None in StudentProgressCreate model

batch_3_apis.POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/progres: Teacher submits progress, session marked completed, revenue trigger attempted
batch_3_apis.POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/rate: Student submits 1-5 rating, teacher average updated
batch_3_apis.POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/recordi: Teacher gets visible=true, admin would get visible=false (stealth)

websocket_events.RAISE_HAND: Broadcasts to all connections in room (student raises hand, teacher sees toast)
websocket_events.LOWER_HAND: Broadcasts to all connections (teacher can lower student's hand)
websocket_events.END_CLASS: Broadcasts to student only (excludes sender), triggers rating modal

frontend_components.SessionReportModal: data-testid='session-report-modal', has surah select, ayah range, track type buttons, grading sliders, notes textarea, submit button
frontend_components.RateTeacherModal: data-testid='rate-teacher-modal', has 5-star rating (data-testid='star-{n}'), review textarea, submit button
frontend_components.LiveKitRoom: ControlBar with raise hand button, VideoStrip with golden border for raised hand

mocked_integrations.revenue_trigger: Calls real wallet logic but may soft-fail if no matching wallet exists for test data

websocket_test_methodology: Used pytest-asyncio with websockets library to test multi-connection scenarios - two connections to same room, verifying broadcast behavior
